title: Generating Arkansas Jobs Act of 2025
key_provision: Creates strategic investment rider; iterative resubmission mechanism for PSC denials; auto-approval if PSC misses deadlines; rate cap at 10% below national average; wind excluded

title: Sales and Use Tax Data Center Exemption Amendment
key_provision: Reduces data center investment threshold from $500M to $100M; creates Qualified Large Data Center ($2B across 2+ nonadjacent sites); fiber infrastructure tax-exempt; crypto mining excluded

title: Decentralized Access to Technology Alternatives Act of 2026
key_provision: Creates Consumer-Regulated Electric Utility (CREU) category exempt from FERC/FPA/PURPA/PUHCA for physically islanded power systems

title: Municipal Moratorium Preemption
key_provision: Tightens procedural requirements for municipal moratoriums on development; requires two public hearings 30 days apart; three-fourths supermajority for final adoption

title: Large Load Interconnection and Utility Planning
key_provision: Establishes standards for >=75MW large loads; cost allocation to data centers; $100K+ interconnection study fees; ERCOT curtailment powers; remote disconnect capability; backup generation disclosure requirements

title: Data Center Moratorium
key_provision: Moratorium on new data center development permits until Nov 2029; Corporation Commission to study impacts on water supply; utility rates; property values

title: Data Center Consumer Ratepayer Protection Act of 2026
key_provision: Requires data centers to pay proportional share of infrastructure costs; prevents cost pass-through to residential/industrial/small-business ratepayers

title: Data Center Tax Incentive Sunset
key_provision: Ends tax incentives for data centers not in operation by Jan 1 2027

title: Data Center Construction Moratorium
status: Introduced Feb 2026 — in Senate Environmental Conservation Committee
sponsor: Sen. Liz Krueger (D); Asm. Anna Kelles (D)
key_provision: 3-year moratorium on permits for data centers >=20MW peak demand; DEC to conduct generic environmental impact statement; PSC to report on rate impacts

title: Data Center Site Application Moratorium
key_provision: Halt all new data center site applications (rezoning; special use; special exception) until July 2028 or fulfillment of all pending interconnection requests

title: Data Center Tax Incentive Reduction
key_provision: Reduce data center tax incentives to replacement equipment and repairs only

title: Emission-Free Backup Generator Requirement
key_provision: Data centers must use emission-free backup generators to maintain tax incentive eligibility

title: Ratepayer and Technological Innovation Protection Act
key_provision: Directs CPUC to study and report on data center energy impacts on ratepayers by Jan 1 2027; no immediate new rates or charges; study-first approach

title: Data Center Water Usage Reporting
key_provision: Would have required data centers to report water usage to local water suppliers; passed both chambers but vetoed by Gov. Newsom
